description_long: This is a compact, modern rifle with a tactical design, featuring a matte black and dark gray finish. The body is constructed primarily from metal with polymer components, and it includes a prominent upper Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories. The rifle has a pistol grip and a short, robust stock, with a visible ejection port and fire selector switch on the side. Two detachable box magazines, each loaded with visible rounds, are shown alongside the rifle, emphasizing its semi-automatic or automatic capability. The barrel is short and thick, optimized for close-quarters urban use, and the front end appears to lack any additional muzzle device. The overall design is utilitarian, with ergonomic features for ease of handling in urban environments.
description: A compact, tactical rifle with a matte black finish, short barrel, and detachable box magazines, designed for urban use. Features include a Picatinny rail, pistol grip, and robust construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, upper rail, and the alignment of the magazines beside the rifle.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the Picatinny rail, pistol grip, fire selector, and the two detachable magazines.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock, back of the receiver, and the magazines placed nearby.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the ejection port, magazine well, and additional details of the receiver and grip.
